subcodes.first_line: O Na'im! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing. In this prison We make mention of thee, and at this moment We turn unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نعیم علیک بهاء الله العزیز العلیم در سجن ترا ذکر مینمائیم و در این حین بتو
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
